wacc.reasoning: Fundamental beta 1.30. Ke = 11.65%. Blended WACC 11.0%. Segment WACC = blended WACC (single segment).

target_12m.forward_metric_description: FY2027E revenue $55M — first year Daimler Truck SOP deliveries begin. 18.8x FY2027E EV/Sales represents the re-rating level as first production arrives and speculation gives way to execution monitoring. Target EV = 18.8 × $55M = $1.034B → equity $1.034B / 73.8M shares = $14.00.
target_12m.multiple_rationale: Comparable: Innoviz (INVZ) currently trades at 15-18x NTM EV/Sales with production programs underway. AEVA should trade at a modest premium (18-19x) to Innoviz given the larger and exclusive EU OEM program. But the current 45x+ NTM EV/Sales for AEVA is unsustainable as the ramp story matures into an execution story. 18.8x is the re-rating level when first production is live. This credits both contracted programs but NOT the extrapolated Luminar replacement wins.
target_12m.judgment_note: Target $14.00 = partial bull credit. The contracted programs are real (CONTRACTED evidence quality) and anchor a floor above pure intrinsic value. The gap between the target ($14.00) and current price ($24.39) is 43% downside — a clear SELL. This target is higher than pure intrinsic convergence ($5.61) because the market will not reprice to fundamental fair value in 12 months; it will re-rate toward a delivery-phase multiple as first production commences.
